body.title: agent_datacenter: tmux console capture for Igor and CC sessions
body.result: tmux pipe-pane in igor launcher → ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/YYYYMMDD.console.log; prune_console_logs.py for 7d retention; CC console = JSONL transcript (handled by chat-history-migrate)
body.description:
Neither Igor's tmux console nor CC's session output is captured to disk. Add tmux pipe-pane logging to Igor's launcher (igor script) and to the agentctl CC-side launch path. Output: ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/YYYYMMDD.console.log and ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/claude_code/YYYYMMDD.console.log. Add a 7-day pruner (prune_console_logs.py) callable from agentctl or as a rack job.

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/igor (launcher script — add pipe-pane call), agent_datacenter/cli/agentctl.py (CC-side capture), lab/claudecode/prune_console_logs.py (new)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (logs are plain files, not DB — n/a); test-plan-or-why-not: manual verification only (tmux side-effects hard to unit-test)
**Scope boundary:** IN: tmux pipe-pane for Igor session, agentctl CC capture, 7d pruner. OUT: log rotation for non-console logs, alerting
**Test plan:** After igor start, verify ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/YYYYMMDD.console.log exists and grows. Pruner: create fake files >7d old, run pruner, verify deleted; recent files retained.
